response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the retrieved record, saved preferences, and filtered list as distinct findings.
Label requested information as unknown when the tools do not return it.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call telecom_get, telecom_profile, and telecom_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the subscription review, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: retrieve tel-218; load the saved operational preferences; and list active subscriptions in Family. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Use only returned fields; label any requested field the tools omit as unknown.
